entry.title: News - Work on two-dimensional perovskites published in Nano Letters

link.title: News - Work on two-dimensional perovskites published in Nano Letters

entry.summary:
Computational work with collaborators Sergei Tretiak and Amanda Neukirch has been published in Nano Letters!
In short, we predict an a mechanism for decreasing exciton binding energies in two-dimensional materials. Here we focus on monolayer lead-halide perovskites and modifying the organic layer such that they introduce acceptor states inside the perovskite fundamental gap. If the perovski...
